Table of provisions

ENDNOTES

NORTHERN TERRITORY OF AUSTRALIA
____________________
As in force at 1 February 2003
____________________
AERODROMES ACT REPEAL ACT 2002
An Act to repeal the Aerodromes Act
1 Short title
This Act may be cited as the Aerodromes Act Repeal Act 2002.
2 Commencement
This Act comes into operation on the date fixed by the Administrator
by notice in the Gazette.
3 Repeal
The Aerodromes Act 1993 (Act No. 32 of 1993) and the
Aerodromes Amendment Act 1997 (Act No. 3 of 1997) are
repealed.
4 Saving of contracts
(1) In this section:
contract means a contract, lease, licence or authority referred to in
section 6(2) of the repealed Act.
repealed Act means the Aerodromes Act as in force immediately
before the commencement of this Act.
(2) On the commencement of this Act, any contract in force
immediately before the commencement continues in force and has
effect in accordance with the terms of that contract.

ENDNOTES
ENDNOTES
